message:
Restrict SSH remote fetch to guarded branches only

The SSH remote (origin-ssh) was configured with a wildcard fetch
refspec, so every topic branch appeared on both origin and origin-ssh.
This caused 'matched multiple remote tracking branches' errors when
running git checkout without an explicit --track flag.

setup-guarded-pushes now replaces the SSH remote's fetch refspec with
one entry per guarded branch. restrict_ssh_remote_fetch is called on
every run, so re-runs and branch-list changes stay in sync.

record_original_state_if_unmanaged saves the original SSH fetch
refspec under hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshFetch. unguard-pushes
restores it when tearing down a pre-existing SSH remote and cleans
up the key on completion.

files.patch:
@@ -171,12 +171,24 @@ sync_managed_branch_push_remotes() {
   git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushManagedBranches "$(branches_config)"
 }
 
+restrict_ssh_remote_fetch() {
+  local repo_root="$1"
+  local ssh_remote="$2"
+  local branch
+
+  git -C "$repo_root" config --local --unset-all "remote.$ssh_remote.fetch" 2>/dev/null || true
+  for branch in "${branches[@]}"; do
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local --add "remote.$ssh_remote.fetch" \
+      "+refs/heads/$branch:refs/remotes/$ssh_remote/$branch"
+  done
+}
+
 record_original_state_if_unmanaged() {
   local repo_root="$1"
   local remote_name="$2"
   local ssh_remote_name="$3"
   local current_remote_url="$4"
-  local git_dir hook_path original_push_default original_ssh_remote_url
+  local git_dir hook_path original_push_default original_ssh_remote_url original_ssh_fetch
 
   if git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemote >/dev/null 2>&1; then
     return 0
@@ -209,6 +221,13 @@ record_original_state_if_unmanaged() {
   else
     git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl '__missing__'
   fi
+  original_ssh_fetch="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get-all "remote.$ssh_remote_name.fetch" 2>/dev/null \
+    | tr '\n' '|' | sed 's/|$//' || true)"
+  if [ -n "$original_ssh_fetch" ]; then
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshFetch "$original_ssh_fetch"
+  else
+    git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshFetch '__none__'
+  fi
 }
 
 while [ $# -gt 0 ]; do
@@ -281,6 +300,10 @@ else
   git -C "$repo_root" remote add "$ssh_remote_name" "$ssh_url"
 fi
 
+# Restrict origin-ssh to only fetch guarded branches so topic branches on
+# origin and origin-ssh don't create checkout ambiguity.
+restrict_ssh_remote_fetch "$repo_root" "$ssh_remote_name"
+
 git -C "$repo_root" config --local remote.pushDefault "$remote_name"
 git -C "$repo_root" config --local hooks.protectedBranches "$(branches_config)"
 sync_managed_branch_push_remotes "$repo_root" "$ssh_remote_name" "$remote_name"

@@ -144,6 +144,7 @@ done
 original_remote_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemoteOriginalUrl 2>/dev/null || true)"
 original_push_default="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushOriginalPushDefault 2>/dev/null || true)"
 original_ssh_remote_url="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl 2>/dev/null || true)"
+original_ssh_fetch="$(git -C "$repo_root" config --local --get hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshFetch 2>/dev/null || true)"
 
 if [ -n "$original_remote_url" ] && git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$remote_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   git -C "$repo_root" remote set-url "$remote_name" "$original_remote_url"
@@ -158,6 +159,20 @@ if git -C "$repo_root" remote get-url "$ssh_remote_name" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
       ;;
     *)
       git -C "$repo_root" remote set-url "$ssh_remote_name" "$original_ssh_remote_url"
+      git -C "$repo_root" config --local --unset-all "remote.$ssh_remote_name.fetch" 2>/dev/null || true
+      case "$original_ssh_fetch" in
+        ''|'__none__')
+          git -C "$repo_root" config --local "remote.$ssh_remote_name.fetch" \
+            "+refs/heads/*:refs/remotes/$ssh_remote_name/*"
+          ;;
+        *)
+          IFS='|' read -ra _fetch_specs <<< "$original_ssh_fetch"
+          for _spec in "${_fetch_specs[@]}"; do
+            [ -n "$_spec" ] && git -C "$repo_root" config --local --add \
+              "remote.$ssh_remote_name.fetch" "$_spec"
+          done
+          ;;
+      esac
       ;;
   esac
 fi
@@ -182,6 +197,7 @@ unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushSshRemote
 unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushPrimaryRemoteOriginalUrl
 unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushOriginalPushDefault
 unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshRemoteUrl
+unset_if_set "$repo_root" hooks.protectedPushOriginalSshFetch
 
 printf 'Removed guarded pushes from %s\n' "$repo_root"
 printf '  remote: %s\n' "$remote_name"
